feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Scheduling agreement not fetching price from info record
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I have a query about the pricing of Scheduling agreement and info record.
First I created info record for following period -
01.01.2024 to 31.12.2024 => 10$
01.01.2025 to 31.12.2025 => 11$
01.01.2026 to 31.12.2026 => 12$

Later, when I created a scheduling agreement with validity period 01.01.2024 to 31.12.2026, the system is showing only pricing record with 10$.

I see the reference of the Info record at item level of scheduling agreement but system doesn't consider the validity period of SA and info record.

Is there any way, the Scheduling agreement can fetch all the three year's valid pricing records from info record such that I will not have to maintain the price manually for all the 3 years in SA.

I referred sap note 1973823 but it wasn't of help.

Thanks

entry.title: How to find the volumes for a subassembly produced in the last 12 & 6 months
entry.content: How to find the volumes for a subassembly produced in the last 12 & 6 months

entry.title: QA32 Inspection plan not found
entry.content:
Hello experts,

i have setup a quality inspection for raw material, and i made GR for that material now the material in quality inspection stock, and the status of inspection lot is CRTD CHCR SPRQ.

so i am not able to do Usage decision.

How to get the inspection lot in REL state? (also inspection plan is already created for that material)

 

thank you

entry.title: Error while generating E-Invoice
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

The customer has issued a Tax Invoice with the Bill To/Ship To Address ID as "S D CORPORATION," but in the BP Master, the Address ID is recorded as "SD CORPORATION."

Upon reviewing the BP Master change log, we did not find any irrelevant entries related to the Address ID. Could you please advise what might be the reason for this discrepancy, and how we can check if the user updated the details from the backend?

According to the BP Master log, the Address ID was updated from "S D CORPORATION" to "SD CORPORATION" at 18:34:33 on 20/09/24, while the invoice was created earlier, at 15:09:13 on the same day.

Your guidance on this matter would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Unable to Fetch the Redayness Report with RC_COLLECT_ANALYSIS_DATA
entry.content:
Hello,

As per the given note- 2913617, we have implemented the required snotes which can be implementable in our system.

However we are still not getting the report as there is some error coming on.

entry.title: Preceding Whitespace is trimmed when an IDoc is sent from SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
hi all,

We are sending an IDOC from SAP Integration suite to SAP ECC systems, but noticed preceding whitespace is being trimmed in a field when it reaches SAP ECC. The logic in mapping is such that if we have more than 70 characters in file name , then a new segment gets created with remaining characters of filename. And when the 71st character is a whitespace this is being trimmed at SAP ECC.

When we switch on trace or simulate it in Integration Suite the space is visible , but is missing when we check the same in SAP ECC systems.

We tried the same example via SAP PO and noticed the space appearing in SAP ECC.

Filename Example - Batch HF_ID225test_2024xxxxxxxxxx_xxxxx_x_xxx 2024 036_xxx_an_xxxxxxxx Seeds_20240912.pdf

Could someone suggest if this is standard behavior of SAP Integration Suite or if there is any standard solution to achieve expected outcome in SPA ECC  

SAP IS simulation

SAP ECC

Regards,

Smitha

entry.title: Absence Quota Generation after 7 hours of overtime on time evaluation
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

We have a requirement for automatic generation of Absence Quota Type 02 when the employee has worked overtime for 7 hours. I have checked the IMG for Generation Rules for Quota Type Selection and have some question about this configuration

1. How do i set the minimum hours worked before the quota is generated? i tried to look around but didn't find any field that indicate the minimum time balance needed.

2. How do i set the validity from of the quota as the generation date and the validity end as +3 after the generation date? i'm guessing the option would be transfer time but i want to make sure what's the differences between accrual period and transfer time

The use-case would be like this :

- On 24.09.2024 if the employee have a minimum of 7 hours overtime, the time evaluation will generate 1 Day of absence quota with validity date 24.09.2024-24.12.2024

Thanks and regard, Kelvin

entry.title: Get all tables mapped to an OBJECTCLASS in CDHDR
entry.content:
Dear all

I like to know a way to get all SAP ERP tables that get updated when an entry for a particular OBJECTCLASS is logged in CDHDR table. I see that there is an entry logged in CDHDR with OBJECTCLASS called "BELEG". I understood that this could mean several tables like BSEG, BKPF, BSID, BSAD have got documents updated within them.

I noticed that updates (Us) in SAP ERP are not getting logged in CDPOS table. So, I like to rely on CDHDR and get list of all tables that got updated for a particular UDATE & OBJECTCLASS. Using this, I will check if data is fresh in my target system (Databricks).

appreciate ideas/thoughts.

Br,

Noor.

entry.content:
How to send the Port details in the E-Waybill XML for export scenario?

entry.title: Event message sending not permitted: Event type evaluation skipped
entry.content: I'm facing with a strange message, Can anyone guide me pls?

entry.title: STO with multiple Schedule Lines will not modify them if new stock becomes available
entry.content:
I have an Intercompany STO with a qty of 1000 due on Oct 10.  I only have 900 in stock and a future PO for another 500 due on Oct 30.  The STO creates a single schedule line for 1000 and confirms 900.  When V_V2 is performed, a second schedule line appears for the uncommitted 100, with a date in November.  This occurs because the availably check is set to use future POs.  Again, this activity is all expected. 

Then we call our vendor and get the next delivery expedited to an earlier date.  The PO delivers early on Oct 01.  we now have 1400 units in stock, but V_V2 will not change the scheduled lines to meet the original requested due date.  It seems to look at the two schedule lines and confirms it can meet them.  My only choice is to open the STO and manually change the schedule lines.   This is fine for 1 STO but this manual intervention is not effective for the entire plant. 

Is there any way to get SAP (ECC6) to change the schedule lines to meet the original due date of Oct 10, now that we have Stock again? 

 

The STO requested 1000 on Oct 10.  The current Schedule lines will deliver 900 on Oct 10 and 100 in November.  This is not desirabl.

entry.title: sql server 2008 Active/standby mode
entry.content:
We want to build SQL Server DIGITS database active/standby mode to achieve real-time synchronization of the whole database, without the need for HA, what technology can be achieved here?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP ECC AR, tcode F.31, how to include payment document type DZ in exposure calculation
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

In SAP ECC AR, tcode F.31, can you please tell how to include payment document type DZ (customer payment or any other document type) in exposure calculation (It's a specific business requirement). I did not find any configuration step allowing this.

It may seems strange to include customer payment in exposure but it's a reel business requirement related to factoring ( you'are paied by bank and then bank will be paied by the reel customer)

Regards

entry.title: Block sales order lines
entry.content:
Dear all,

We have a request from our customer. He would like the line(s) of the sales order to be blocked when the quantity is not full.
At the moment it doesn't block, so we need to go back to the orders to check and correct them if necessary.

Thanks for your help,

entry.title: How to generate an XAF audit file Netherlands
entry.content:
Hello,

we got the request from our dutch accountant to generate an XAF File for Auditors. Although XAF seems to be obligatory since 2010 we were not aksed until now to provide such information. When I check  the Support Portal I found a lot of notes how to establish this function by using the SAP Document and Reporting Compliance but these are all valid only for S/4 HANA.

So although we have licensed SAP DRC due to other request we do not have S/4 HANA at the moment, we are still running on ECC 6.18.

There are also some very rough descriptions how to enable ECC by using DART and AIF to generate this file but these explanation are not detailed enough and AIF Setup is not really smart.

I would be pleased if somebody with an SAP ERP 6.18 share his/her customer expierence with me how to deal with this challenge.

Regards

Holger

SAP ERP SAP Document and Reporting Compliance FIN (Finance) SAP Application Interface Framework

entry.title: GPD : Production order Planned Scrap note pegged
entry.content:
Have a planned order with qty 4 where there is 2 Planned Scrap. Pegging has then shown total Qty 4 with Excess of 2 and assigned Qty 2. 

Converted to Production order and Pegging now shows total Qty 2 and Assign Qty 2. no Excess reported.. 

MRP is showing requirement of 2 and Scrap 2.

entry.title: Required Clarification regarding SAP Rise FUE Access based on Activity
entry.content:
In SAP Rise, users are classified into three primary categories: Advanced, Core, and Self-Service. I require clarification regarding the classification of the following activities to determine under which user category they fall:

  • Sales Invoice Creation (VF01)
  • Purchase Order Creation (ME21N)
  • Payable Creation (MIRO)
  • Payable Parking (MIR7)
  • Customer Invoice Clearing (F-28)
  • Vendor Invoice Clearing (F-53)
  • Cash Journal Posting (FBCJ)
  • G/L Accounting Posting (F-02)
  • Customer Down Payments (F-29)
  • Account Receivable (FB70)
  • Account Payable (FB60)
  • G/L account document (FB50)
  • Asset Creation (AS01)
  • Asset Acquisition (F-9c0)

I know the display access is part of self service mostly, I just need to know the creation and posting activity categories. 

Your guidance in identifying the appropriate user categories for each activity would be appreciated.

entry.title: Tax Determination in Third Party Sales
entry.content:
Dear experts,

How tax is determined in Third Party Sales if Slold to Party , Vendor  and Ship to Party belongs to different Countries?

entry.title: fbl1n transaction access the archive server for retrieving the data
entry.content:
Hi team,

We want to know how frequently this fbl1n transaction access the archive server for retrieving the data

Regards

Arun George

entry.title: Block for accounting of additions of an AF with zero useful life and zero residual value
entry.content:
Dear support
I need to know if there is any parameterization at the customizing level to block postings for additions to Fixed Assets with zero useful life and zero residual value.
I was checking and couldn't find any standard options.
Could you tell me if this is possible using the BADI FIAA_002? Or is there another way to develop ABAP logic to solve this requirement of my company?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
